payload: Emad and Ghadr ballistic missiles, Shahed-136 drones
damage: Impacts reported in Tel Aviv (1 fatality, 21 injuries) and Bnei Brak (several injuries). Damage to US facilities in Gulf region.
targets: Nevatim airbase, Tel Aviv, US military facilities in Persian Gulf
description: First wave of Operation True Promise 4; large-scale coordinated attack with drones to saturate defenses followed by ballistic missiles. Launched hours after US-Israeli Operation Epic Fury/Roaring Lion strikes on Iran.
launch_site_description: Multiple sites in western Iran including Kermanshah and Tabriz regions
interception_systems: Arrow-2, Arrow-3, Iron Dome, SM-3, THAAD, Patriot
interception_report: Multi-layered coalition defense. US Navy destroyers engaged with SM-3. Arrow-3 exoatmospheric intercepts. Allied jets intercepted drones over Iraq/Jordan.
sources: IDF reports high interception rate in coordination with allies; minor damage to one base

targets: Tel Aviv, US bases in Iraq
description: Second wave continuing initial retaliatory barrage on Feb 28; 2-4 missiles per salvo pattern observed.

payload: Advanced ballistic missiles, drones, cruise missiles
damage: Abdullah Al-Mubarak Air Base in Kuwait reportedly disabled. Damage to Harir base in Iraq.
targets: Israeli naval base in Haifa, warship dock in Haifa, Ramat David Air Base, HaKirya (Ministry of War) Tel Aviv, Abdullah Al-Mubarak Air Base Kuwait, Harir base Iraq, Prince Sultan Air Base Saudi Arabia
description: Third wave; IRGC announced using more advanced missiles than True Promise 3. Expanded targeting to Gulf logistics infrastructure.

damage: Continued strikes on Gulf and Israeli targets
targets: Beit Shams military-industrial complex, Ishtod military-industrial complex, US bases in Kuwait and Iraq
description: Fourth wave; continued expansion of targeting to military-industrial sites in Israel and Gulf bases.

damage: IRGC claims strikes on American vessels and Abdullah Mubarak naval base in Kuwait. Oil tanker reportedly struck in Indian Ocean.
targets: American vessels in Indian Ocean, Abdullah Mubarak naval base Kuwait
description: Fifth wave; shift to maritime and Gulf targets. IRGC Navy involvement. MSP and MST logistics vessels in Indian Ocean reportedly struck (unverified).

damage: IRGC claims hits on Tel Nof Air Base, HaKirya HQ, and Haifa naval installations
targets: Tel Nof Air Base, HaKirya headquarters (Israeli Defense Ministry/military command) Tel Aviv, Israeli Navy base Haifa, Haifa military naval yard
description: Sixth wave; escalation to targeting Israeli political-military command infrastructure in dense urban Tel Aviv. IRGC signaling ability to strike leadership centers.
interception_systems: Arrow-2, Arrow-3, David's Sling, Iron Dome

damage: Three US/British oil tankers in Persian Gulf struck and reportedly engulfed in fire. Ali Al-Salem naval base Kuwait shut down. Heavy damage to US base in Bahrain.
targets: US/British oil tankers in Persian Gulf/Strait of Hormuz, Ali Al-Salem naval base Kuwait, Mohammed Al-Ahmad Naval Base Kuwait, Mina Salman US naval base Bahrain, USS Abraham Lincoln
description: Seventh wave; massive expansion to maritime targets. IRGC claims 4 ballistic missiles fired at USS Abraham Lincoln carrier. Three oil tankers struck. Major Gulf base attacks.
proxy_involvement: US Navy Aegis systems engaged incoming missiles targeting carrier group

damage: IRGC claims 560 US military killed/wounded across waves 7-8 (unverified). Continued tanker fires.
targets: Continued strikes on American and Israeli targets, regional US bases
description: Eighth wave; continuation of wave 7 operations. IRGC claims massive US casualties (560 killed/wounded - unverified). Large-scale drone deployments.

damage: IRGC claims strikes on 60 strategic targets and 500 combined US/Israeli sites since operation start. Cluster munition warhead strike near Tel Aviv injured 12.
targets: US naval assets, Israeli defense systems, drones across multiple regions
description: Ninth wave; IRGC claims 700+ drones and hundreds of missiles launched since operation began. Cluster munition warhead used against Tel Aviv area (12 injuries).

damage: IRGC claims hits on Israeli government complex in Tel Aviv, military/security centers in Haifa, and East Jerusalem. Strike in Beersheba injured at least 10.
targets: Israeli government complex Tel Aviv, military/security centers Haifa, East Jerusalem
description: Tenth wave; featured advanced Kheibar Shekan maneuvering missiles (MaRV-equipped, Mach 8, 500-1500kg warhead). IRGC stated it 'opened the great gates of fire upon the occupied territories.'
proxy_involvement: Kheibar Shekan MaRV capability challenged air defenses; maneuvering warheads designed to defeat Arrow and David's Sling
target_lat: Central Israel, Tel Aviv, Haifa, Jerusalem, Beersheba
sources: IDF assessing damage from advanced missile strikes

damage: IRGC claims strikes on US intelligence centers, military support warehouses in Persian Gulf, Israeli army communications complex in Beersheba, 20+ points in Tel Aviv/West Jerusalem/Galilee
targets: US intelligence centers and military support warehouses in Persian Gulf, Israeli army communications complex Beersheba, 20+ sites in Tel Aviv/West Jerusalem/Galilee
description: Eleventh wave; naval and aerospace IRGC units. Targeted communications and intelligence infrastructure. IRGC claims 500 sites targeted in preceding 48 hours.

damage: IRGC Navy claims: Arifjan base Kuwait hit by 12 drones in two phases; Al Minhad base UAE hit by 6 drones and 5 ballistic missiles; US naval facilities Bahrain destroyed by 6 drones; fuel tanker Athens Nova in Strait of Hormuz struck by 2 drones and still burning.
targets: US Arifjan base Kuwait, US Al Minhad command center UAE, US naval facilities Bahrain, fuel tanker Athens Nova in Strait of Hormuz
description: Twelfth wave; IRGC Navy-led maritime campaign. 26 drones and 5 ballistic missiles targeting US assets in three Gulf countries plus Strait of Hormuz maritime target.
proxy_involvement: Gulf state air defenses engaged incoming drones; THAAD and Patriot systems at US bases

damage: IRGC claims strikes on US Marine Corps installations at Arifjan base Kuwait
targets: US Navy Marine base at Arifjan base Kuwait, Ali Al-Salim air base Kuwait
description: Thirteenth wave; IRGC Navy drone unit targeting Kuwaiti-based US Marine installations. Marked first clear indication of different IRGC branches coordinating successive waves under unified command.

damage: IRGC claims main command building and HQ of US air base destroyed; fuel tanks set on fire. 20 drones and 3 missiles claimed to have hit targets.
targets: US air base Sheikh Isa area Bahrain
description: Fourteenth wave; IRGC Navy large-scale attack on US air base in Bahrain with drones and missiles.

damage: Strikes on Al-Udeid Air Base Qatar and Israeli positions. IRGC claims 7 Israeli drones shot down (Hermes, Heron, MQ-9). Fragmentation warhead detonation in Petah Tikva causing blast damage and injuries.
targets: Al-Udeid Air Base Qatar, Israeli positions
description: Fifteenth wave; continued geographic expansion. Also targeted 10 key points at Sheikh Isa Air Base Bahrain. Air raid sirens in central Israel. IRGC claims to have shot down 7 Israeli drones.

damage: IRGC claims strikes on HaKirya (IDF general staff and Ministry of War), strategic infrastructure in Bnei Brak, military targets in Beit Hakfa
targets: HaKirya (IDF general staff and Ministry of War) Tel Aviv, strategic infrastructure Bnei Brak, military targets Beit Hakfa
description: Sixteenth wave; critical shift - IRGC Ground Forces entered the battlefield with three simultaneous operations and 230 attack drones. Multi-domain offensive. Aerospace Division also struck 'heart and northern parts of occupied territories.'
launch_site_description: Western Iran, IRGC ground force positions
intercepted_by_israel: Arrow-2, Arrow-3, Iron Dome, David's Sling
target_lon: Central Israel, Tel Aviv, Bnei Brak

announcement_source: IRGC Aerospace Force / Tasnim News Agency
description: Seventeenth wave; codename 'Sacred: O Messenger of Allah.' 40+ ballistic missiles fired by IRGC Aerospace Force. Religious-nationalist messaging increasingly prominent.
